Metadata.title: Next.js 16 file conventions playground
Metadata.description: An interactive playground for Next.js 16 App Router file conventions, running in English, Russian, and Tajik.

HomePage.title: Next.js 16 file conventions playground
HomePage.description: Click into each one to see it actually run. Check the terminal and the browser console too — several demos log there.
HomePage.demoCount: {count, plural, =0 {No demos yet} one {# demo} other {# demos}} available

layout.title: layout.js
layout.blurb: Persists across navigation — state never resets.

template.title: template.js
template.blurb: Resets component state on every navigation, unlike layout.js.

loading.title: loading.js
loading.blurb: Instant Suspense fallback while a slow page streams in.

error.title: error.js
error.blurb: Error boundary with the new unstable_retry prop (v16.2).

notFound.title: not-found.js
notFound.blurb: Custom UI rendered when notFound() is called.

routeGroups.title: Route Groups
routeGroups.blurb: (folder) segments organize routes without affecting the URL.

feed.title: Intercepting Routes
feed.blurb: Open a photo as a modal, masking the URL, via (.)photo.

routeHandler.title: route.js
routeHandler.blurb: A GET/POST API endpoint hit from the browser.

instrumentation.title: instrumentation.js / instrumentation-client.js
instrumentation.blurb: Server + browser console logging on boot and navigation.

segmentConfig.title: Route Segment Config
segmentConfig.blurb: export const revalidate controls re-fetch timing.

Forbidden.title: 403 — Forbidden
Forbidden.description: forbidden() was called. This is app/[locale]/forbidden.tsx.

Unauthorized.title: 401 — Unauthorized
Unauthorized.description: unauthorized() was called. This is app/[locale]/unauthorized.tsx.

RootNotFound.title: 404 — Not Found
RootNotFound.description: This is app/[locale]/not-found.tsx. It catches any locale-prefixed URL that doesn't match a route in this app — try a nonsense URL, e.g. /en/this-does-not-exist.

AuthDemo.title: forbidden() / unauthorized()
AuthDemo.description: Experimental auth-interrupt functions, enabled via experimental.authInterrupts in next.config.ts. Calling them renders app/forbidden.tsx / app/unauthorized.tsx and sets the matching HTTP status code.

DynamicDemo.title: Dynamic Segments
DynamicDemo.description: app/demos/dynamic/[slug]/page.tsx reads whatever you put in the URL. Try either link, or edit the URL by hand:

ErrorDemo.description: Click the button to throw during render and trigger the nearest error.js boundary.
ErrorDemo.boomMessage: Boom! This error was thrown on purpose.

FeedDemo.description: Click a photo: client-side navigation opens it as a modal, masking the URL. Then hard-refresh the page (or open the URL in a new tab) and you get the standalone full page instead — no interception.
FeedDemo.modalCaption: Photo #{id} — rendered by the intercepted route at @modal/(.)photo/[id]/page.tsx. The URL says /demos/feed/photo/{id} but the feed is still visible behind this modal.
FeedDemo.photoPageDescription: You landed here directly (hard navigation or refresh), so the interception was skipped and this standalone page rendered instead.

InstrumentationDemo.title: instrumentation.ts & instrumentation-client.ts
InstrumentationDemo.description: These are root-level files, not routes — there's nothing to click here. Instead:
InstrumentationDemo.bulletServer: Look at the terminal running npm run dev — instrumentation.ts logged once when the server booted.
InstrumentationDemo.bulletClient: Open the browser DevTools console — instrumentation-client.ts logged on page load, and logs again on every navigation via onRouterTransitionStart.

LayoutDemo.title: layout.js (persists)
LayoutDemo.mountedNote: This layout mounted once, at {time}, and stays mounted as you navigate between the child pages below.
LayoutDemo.pickNote: Pick a, b, or c above to navigate between child pages.
LayoutDemo.idResult: Now showing: {id}. Click the counter above, then switch a/b/c — the count survives because layout.js never remounts.

LoadingDemo.title: loading.js
LoadingDemo.streamingFallback: Streaming fallback, shown instantly while the page suspends…
LoadingDemo.awaitNote: This page awaits a fake 1.5s fetch before rendering. Use the plain link below (full reload) to see the loading.js fallback again.

NotFoundDemo.title: not-found.js
NotFoundDemo.description: This Server Component calls notFound() when told to, rendering not-found.js for this segment instead of the page.
NotFoundDemo.renderedDescription: notFound() was called — Next.js rendered this file instead of the page, and returns a 404 status for non-streamed responses.

ParallelDemo.title: Parallel Routes
ParallelDemo.description: @team and @analytics render simultaneously, alongside children, from this one layout. Click into @team's settings link with normal (soft) navigation first, then hard-refresh the /settings URL to see default.js kick in.
ParallelDemo.childrenSlotNote: This is the children slot at /demos/parallel.
ParallelDemo.childrenDefaultFallback: children default.js fallback — the root page has no /settings route, so this renders on a hard navigation to /demos/parallel/settings.
ParallelDemo.teamSettings: Team settings page — nested under @team, at URL /demos/parallel/settings.
ParallelDemo.analyticsDefaultFallback: @analytics default.js fallback — shown on a hard refresh because /settings doesn't exist in this slot.

ProxyDemo.title: proxy.ts
ProxyDemo.description: proxy.ts, in the project root, redirects /demos/proxy/old to /demos/proxy/new before the page ever renders. This file was called "middleware" before Next.js 16 — same behavior, new name.
ProxyDemo.neverSeeThis: You should never see this — proxy.ts redirects this path server-side.
ProxyDemo.redirectedDescription: proxy.ts matched /demos/proxy/old and redirected here server-side. Check the terminal for the "[proxy.ts] intercepted request" log line.

RouteGroupsDemo.title: Route Groups
RouteGroupsDemo.description: (marketing) and (shop) exist as folders on disk but don't appear in the URL.
RouteGroupsDemo.aboutPageDescription: Served from app/demos/route-groups/(marketing)/about/page.tsx — the (marketing) segment is invisible in the URL.
RouteGroupsDemo.cartPageDescription: Served from app/demos/route-groups/(shop)/cart/page.tsx — the (shop) segment is invisible in the URL.

RouteHandlerDemo.title: route.js
RouteHandlerDemo.description: app/demos/route-handler-demo/api/route.ts exports GET and POST handlers using the Web Request/Response APIs.

SegmentConfigDemo.title: Route Segment Config
SegmentConfigDemo.description: This page exports revalidate = 10. In dev mode every request is fresh, so this timestamp always changes. Run npm run build then npm run start and reload repeatedly to see it stay frozen for ~10s at a time.

TemplateDemo.title: template.js (resets)
TemplateDemo.note: This template remounts every time the id below changes — watch the mount time and click count reset.
TemplateDemo.pickNote: Pick a, b, or c above to navigate between child pages.
